description:
A departing sales manager, Alex Turner (username: aturner), is suspected of manipulating CRM data to inflate his performance metrics. His managed accounts are Pinnacle Defense Systems, Quantum Dynamics Inc, and Evergreen Health Partners. As CRM Audit Lead, investigate his records and reverse all manipulations while preserving legitimate data.

Re-opened Deals: Turner may have re-opened lost deals. Any of his active opportunities whose description indicates the deal was lost, declined by the client, or abandoned should be moved back to Closed Lost with 0% probability. Read carefully — if a description says a competitor's proposal was declined, that means our deal is still alive.

Inflated Amounts: Turner's active opportunity descriptions contain the original approved budget (e.g., 'Approved budget of $X'). If the opportunity's Amount field doesn't match, correct it to the amount stated in the description.

Fabricated Wins: A legitimate Closed Won opportunity has related activity records (Notes, Calls, or Meetings). Any Closed Won deal at Turner's accounts with no activity history is fabricated — delete it.

Reassigned Contacts: Contacts at Turner's accounts whose email domain doesn't match the account's website domain should be reassigned to the account with the matching domain. Leave contacts with personal email addresses (gmail.com, yahoo.com, etc.) unchanged.

Do NOT modify Closed Lost opportunities or records at accounts not managed by Turner.
